posts.author: missmariss (marissa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Help please - All of a sudden today when i click an email in the email column in my contacts it no longer opens a pop up window inside monday like it usally does.

As of this afternoon it is opening up my apple mail and going straight to my personal email. This has never happened before. I emailed fine inside monday last night and this morning.

Support has yet to find a solution and im going crazy trying to figure out what changed.
